assumptions: The developer has a supported browser, a reachable email address, a phone number, and a valid payment method.
The developer is creating a standalone AWS account outside AWS Organizations and India-specific seller flows unless those routes are later selected.
No AWS service, workload, region, or IAM administrator setup exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a standalone AWS account and reach the earliest meaningful AWS first-success outcome.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved: AWS documents complete account signup, then many co-equal service and orientation routes rather than one default workload terminal.
first_success.observable_signal: Candidates include console orientation completion or a service-specific result such as a running EC2 instance.

route_selection.surface: Self-service AWS account signup and Management Console
route_selection.rule: Account creation can be reconstructed from official docs, but the post-account first-success route must be fixed before counting a complete path.

candidates.name: Standalone account signup only through activation
candidates.reason: Official first-time-user docs define a complete signup sequence ending in account activation, but activation alone is not a demonstrated workload first success under the measurement contract.

candidates.name: Management Console orientation guide
candidates.reason: Hands-on console guide reaches navigation familiarity and then points to separate service tutorials.

candidates.name: Launch a first EC2 instance
candidates.reason: Complete compute path, but AWS general getting-started material does not designate EC2 over other services.

required_path.action: Open Sign up for AWS, enter the root-user email address and AWS account name, and choose Verify email address.
required_path.observable_result: AWS sends a verification code to the root-user email address.

required_path.action: Enter the email verification code and verify it.
required_path.observable_result: AWS advances to root-user password creation.

required_path.action: Create and confirm a compliant root-user password, then continue.
required_path.observable_result: AWS advances to account plan selection.

required_path.action: Choose an account plan, enter contact information, and accept the AWS Customer Agreement.
Enter a valid payment method and billing address.
required_path.observable_result: AWS can continue to phone identity confirmation.

required_path.action: Confirm identity by phone SMS code when prompted.
required_path.observable_result: AWS advances to Support plan selection.

required_path.action: Choose a Support plan and complete sign up.
required_path.observable_result: AWS shows account activation in progress.

required_path.action: After activation, select one post-account first-success route such as console orientation or a specific service quickstart.
required_path.observable_result: One bounded AWS workload or orientation terminal is fixed.

prerequisites.description: A reachable root-user email address, phone number for SMS or voice identity checks, contact and billing addresses, and a valid payment method.

external_gates.description: A valid payment method is mandatory before standalone signup can continue.
Phone-based identity confirmation must succeed before Support plan selection.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email delivery of the signup verification code.
Account activation usually takes a few minutes and can take up to 24 hours before console use.

platform_outcomes.description: AWS creates the account and sends an activation confirmation email after signup completes.

excluded.item: Recommended AWS CLI install and AWS MCP Server setup
excluded.reason: Official first-time-user docs label these steps recommended after account creation, not required for a specific workload terminal.
Different entitlement and administrator path from standalone signup.
Official docs branch India address and CVV verification separately from the audited non-India instructions.

sources.title: Getting started with an AWS account
AWS Getting Started Resource Center
evidence_supported: Multiple beginner onboarding tasks and tutorials

sources.title: What is an AWS account / create account overview

uncertainties.question: Which post-account AWS outcome is the selected first success: console orientation, a specific service quickstart, or another hands-on guide?
uncertainties.impact: Action counts, waits, and external gates after activation change by service and guide.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one bounded workload or orientation goal with current official steps from an activated account.

uncertainties.question: Do live signup screens currently match the documented field order, including plan picker and Support plan names?
uncertainties.impact: Field labels and step boundaries for a verified count need public UI confirmation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of portal.aws.amazon.com/billing/signup for a new standalone account.
